description: Overview of the repository, directory contents, and reuse notes.
CC0-1.0 license file.
Compressed JSONL file containing the full NCBI metadata pool for publicly available Listeria monocytogenes genome assemblies used as the initial data source.
Compressed TSV metadata table for the nine-source food/environmental training isolate set.
Compressed TSV metadata table for the external human clinical isolate set.
Compressed TSV metadata table for seed genomes used in study-specific wgMLST scheme construction.
Mapping table used to harmonize NCBI isolation-source metadata into predefined source categories.
Compressed cgMLST allele-profile matrix for the nine-source training isolates.
Compressed cgMLST allele-profile matrix for the external human isolates.
Compressed full retained wgMLST allele-profile matrix for the nine-source training isolates.
Compressed full retained wgMLST allele-profile matrix for the external human isolates.
Compressed Top800 wgMLST allele-profile matrix for the nine-source training isolates.
Compressed Top800 wgMLST allele-profile matrix for the external human isolates.
Ranking-score table for retained wgMLST loci, including source-attribution signal metrics used for TopN feature selection.
Final Top800 wgMLST locus list used by the main KNNTrace model.
Functional annotation table for retained wgMLST loci, including Swiss-Prot hit information and functional categories when available.
R script for filtering wgMLST loci based on missingness, major-allele frequency, polymorphism, and redundancy criteria.
R script for ranking filtered wgMLST loci by KNN/Hamming source-attribution signal and generating TopN locus sets.
R script for calculating source-specific cgMLST distance thresholds from training isolates.
R script for calculating source-specific Top800 wgMLST distance thresholds from training isolates.
R script for post-filtering external human cgMLST predictions using confidence and normalized source-specific distance thresholds.
R script for post-filtering external human Top800 wgMLST predictions using confidence and normalized source-specific distance thresholds.
R script for cgMLST GLMNET/LASSO multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for wgMLST GLMNET/LASSO multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for cgMLST KNN-Hamming model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for ranked wgMLST TopN KNN-Hamming benchmarking, including the Top800 main model.
R script for cgMLST Random Forest multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for wgMLST Random Forest multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for cgMLST XGBoost multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
R script for wgMLST XGBoost multiclass model training and five-fold cross-validation.
File-level manifest describing repository contents.
Column-level data dictionary for key tables and matrices.
Markdown description of repository organization and omitted files.
